summary: Strong early set highlighted by solid drums and a killer overall performance, though energy wanes after the drum segment; recording is well‑liked despite no detailed technical notes.
review: The show opens with high energy and a powerful Drum segment that keeps the momentum going, but the excitement tapers off after the drums. The reviewer praises the recording as their favorite of the year, indicating it sounds good enough for repeated listening even though specific sound quality details are not mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) provides a generally positive view of both the performance and the recording; limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard, audience mix, or clarity; reviewer simply states they like this recording best.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic start and strong drum segment, but the momentum drops after drums, leading to a less compelling second half.
